trglob
Copyright (c) 2023 Ken Domino
# trglob

## Summary

Expand a glob string into file names.

## Description

## Usage

    trgen <string>+

## Examples

    trglob '../examples/**/*.dart'
    trglob '../examples/**'

## Current version

0.23.43 Fixes to trgen templates.
